rows.notes: Page title at top of sheet. Handwriting for the title is fairly clear though the Latinized spelling is slightly irregular ('Arrearagia' rather than 'Arrearages'); there are no monetary figures on this line.
Clear centered section header with underline; no amounts present.
Numbers aligned in the pounds column as '90' with dashes in s and d columns indicating zero. Vertical ruling lines are unambiguous.
Pounds column clearly reads '20'. Parish name is slightly uncertain in spelling (handwritten 'Menheniot' / 'Menhennist' possibilities), but amount alignment is clear.
Pounds '40' is legible in pounds column. The place name reads as 'Kidlington' (handwritten) and the 'two years' remark is clear.
Entry shows '2' in pounds column and '15' in shillings column. Both align well with the ruling lines; pence column empty.
Clear '10' in pounds column. Description 'Lucas Eaton five Years' legible.
Pounds column clearly shows '2'. 'Bampton' and 'two years' readable.
Pounds '3' is clear. The place name spelling is somewhat uncertain in the handwriting ('Mountacute' / 'Mountacate'), but amount alignment is unambiguous.

There is a clear '10' sitting in the shillings column with no pounds digit; interpreted as 10s. The description reads 'Jesu, College' but the exact punctuation and spacing are uncertain in the manuscript; alignment of the '10' is slightly ambiguous against neighboring lines.
All three values (8 | 6 | 8) are clearly written and align well with the three ruling columns. Description is legible as 'Hertford College - five years'.
Pounds '7' and shillings '12' are visible and valid (shillings < 20). Pence column blank. The institutional name 'S. Martins' is slightly abbreviated but readable.

rows.description: Padbury, St. Mary Magd. three years
rows.notes: Pounds '4' and shillings '5' clearly aligned. 'St. Mary Magd.' abbreviation is legible in context.
Numbers read as '9' pounds and '6' shillings; pence blank. The place name is hard to parse (possible readings: 'Trekevin', 'Trelkevin') so confidence reduced for description spelling.
Pounds '6' and shillings '6' clearly visible. The surname/place reads as 'Wild. Arish' in the manuscript; punctuation could vary.
All three columns show legible digits (6 | 6 | 8). Description 'Back. Gate, Coppin' is readable in the handwriting.
Pounds '9', shillings '6', pence '8' are neatly aligned in their columns. 'Lad Lane, Comptor' reading is clear.
Entry uses 'Do' indicating same head; numeric trio '6 | 13 | 4' is legible. Small uncertainty in the dash/spacing but amounts aligned and valid.
Same numeric pattern as previous lines: '6' pounds, '13' shillings, '4' pence. 'Pickford' transcription readable though slightly cramped in ink.
Amounts '6 | 13 | 4' repeated; clear alignment. The place name 'Medenham' is legible though alternative spellings could exist in the source.

rows.description: Sr. Gregory P. Turner, Leverett's Close
rows.notes: Numeric columns read '6 | 10 | 10' clearly. The name/description 'Sr. Gregory P. Turner, Leverett's Close' is mostly clear though abbreviated ('Sr.' and initial usage).
Centered subsection header with underline; no monetary figures on this line.
Well-aligned '1 | 6 | 8' in the pounds/shillings/pence columns. The name 'W. Gardiner. Hesteri' is legible in context.
No pounds digit, shillings '6' and pence '8' are visible (interpreted as 6s 8d). 'Do — Evins' reading is plausible though punctuation/spacing is indistinct.
Clear '4 | 5 | 8' across the three currency columns. 'Timber' and 'two years' are readable.
Pounds/shillings/pence '6 | 10 | 5' are clearly written and valid. Description 'Beck - five years' legible.
Pounds column blank, shillings '6' and pence '8' align clearly. 'Barnwell' reading is somewhat cramped but readable.
Only a single '8' is visible in the far-right (pence) column; interpreted as 8d. This line is faint and could alternatively be 8s, but alignment places it in pence column so recorded as 8 pence.
Clear '2' in shillings column and '6' in pence column (2s 6d). Description 'Curnock — five years' is legible.
